channel.title: Hugo on Nishimiya
channel.description: Recent content in Hugo on Nishimiya

item.title: Switching To Hugo!
item.description: As of Saturday, 2 November 2024. I am embracing Hugo as my static website generator. It’s all started with Cyan Nyan stream. Previously, I always wrote my website with vanilla HTML/CSS but now im taking it easy with a pre-made template by CaiJimmy Hugo Theme Starter. Very customizable with scss and there’s neat feature called shortcodes which you can see the embedded youtube video above.
